purpose: Use this file to show customers how templates differ before they choose.

templates.name: Minimal Store
templates.visualDifference: Large whitespace, minimal product cards, calm premium shopping experience.
templates.catalogCardStyle: clean cards with large image, product name, short benefit, price, quick add

templates.name: Bold Fashion Store
templates.visualDifference: Feels like a fashion brand, not a normal product grid. Uses collections, model images, drops, and lookbook.
templates.catalogCardStyle: large lifestyle image cards with hover reveal, size swatches, sale badges

templates.name: Marketplace Style
templates.visualDifference: Dense catalog with search bar, side filters, deals, ratings, and comparison feeling.
templates.catalogCardStyle: compact cards with rating, discount, delivery badge, quick view, compare
templates.customerFeeling: Amazon-style discovery, many products, practical and fast

templates.name: Luxury Product Store
templates.visualDifference: Not a normal shop grid. Feels like a luxury showroom with storytelling and premium imagery.
templates.catalogCardStyle: large cinematic product cards with limited text, material note, premium price display

templates.name: Digital Products Store
templates.visualDifference: Catalog sells outcomes, previews, modules, and bundles instead of simple physical products.
templates.catalogCardStyle: offer cards with outcome, included files/modules, instant access badge, preview button

templates.name: Startup Landing
templates.visualDifference: No product grid. It uses plan cards, features, demo, and signup flow.
templates.catalogCardStyle: plan cards with features, recommended badge, monthly/yearly toggle
templates.customerFeeling: SaaS/app landing page, not a store

templates.name: Personal Brand Landing
templates.visualDifference: Client chooses a person/service package, not products. Strong about/results/contact layout.
templates.catalogCardStyle: service package cards with outcome, session length, who it is for, CTA
templates.customerFeeling: personal expert page with service packages

templates.name: Event / Promo Landing
templates.visualDifference: Built around time, date, agenda, ticket/lead capture, and urgency.
templates.catalogCardStyle: ticket cards or promo offer blocks with urgency, date, price, availability

templates.name: Local Business Pro
templates.visualDifference: Services are organized by area and quote request, not by shopping cart.
templates.catalogCardStyle: service cards with icon, short description, starting price or quote CTA

templates.name: Appointment Booking
templates.visualDifference: Catalog behaves like a booking menu with price, duration, staff, and schedule CTA.
templates.catalogCardStyle: service menu cards with duration, price, staff availability, book button

templates.name: Professional Services
templates.visualDifference: Serious service catalog built around credibility, case type, process, and consultation.
templates.catalogCardStyle: professional service cards with problem solved, credentials, consultation CTA

templates.name: Restaurant / Food Business
templates.visualDifference: Feels like a restaurant menu, with categories, specials, food photos, and ordering.
templates.catalogCardStyle: menu item cards with food image, description, price, dietary tags, order button

templates.name: Contractor Before / After
templates.visualDifference: Catalog is a portfolio of transformations, not products. Before/after is the main selling point.
templates.catalogCardStyle: project cards with before/after images, project type, location, result summary
